violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Can Opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The tile flooring in the kitchen has areas of poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2026
The table in the dishwashing room was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024
The rinse area of the dishwasher was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

The condensate from the walk in cooler refrigeration unit was observed iced over on the walk in cooler walls.. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The wall behind the mechanical dishwasher is poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The receiving door to the outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The floor in the walk-in cooler area, the 3-bay sink area, and in some areas of the kitchen, is in poor repair. Several tiles are cracked, and the linoleum is missing sections and covered over with material that is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

The floors and walls in some areas of the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
